description: Style Note remanika combines edgy style with flattering fits in all their creations, including this bright, trendy top. Pair it with a pair of well worn and well fitted jeans and flip flops for a disarmingly casual look.Product Details Red and purple striped top, has a crossover V neckline with a ribbed border and stitched only at the apex of the V, has a broad stretchable ribbed waistband and short batwing sleeves with ribbed cuffs  Material and Care Cotton Gentle machine wash Do not bleach and flat dry only Use cold iron  Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
